title: PseudoSMP [OFFICIAL]
description: The OFFICIAL modpack for the PseudoSMP server.
body:
![PseudoSMP logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25e0ad48638185c20901242ad787429fc128db59.png)

# ABOUT
This Cobblemon modpack was created for the official PseudoSMP Minecraft server. It introduces new creatures to capture, train, and battle, alongside enhanced building mods to boost your creative experience. All of this is designed to build on Minecraft’s core gameplay without losing the charm of its original survival, crafting, and building mechanics.

# PERFORMANCE
To ensure smooth gameplay, we've added a variety of performance mods that optimize the game’s performance without compromising its quality. These mods enhance frame rates, reduce lag, and improve loading times, providing a seamless experience whether you're exploring, building, or battling. With these optimizations, you can enjoy Minecraft’s full potential, even in larger worlds or with more complex builds.

# SINGLEPLAYER & MULTIPLAYER

This Modpack is designed to provide a seamless experience for both single-player and multiplayer gameplay.

In single-player, players can dive into a rich world where they capture and train Cobblemon, complete quests, and explore diverse biomes at their own pace. The mod is structured to provide a challenging and rewarding experience for solo adventurers, with progression systems that keep players engaged.

For multiplayer, the modpack emphasizes cooperation and competition. Players can team up to trade Cobblemon, battle each other, and work together to explore and conquer challenges. The multiplayer design allows for easy server setup, so friends can join in on the adventure, enhancing the overall experience with social interaction and teamwork.
